tasks.description: Create the fibonacci.py script containing the fibonacci function
Create a test_fibonacci.py script that asserts the output of fibonacci(10) is 55
tasks.output:
Reasoning: I will write unit tests checking edge cases and the required fibonacci(10) == 55 check.
[FILE: test_fibonacci.py]
```python
from fibonacci import fibonacci

def test_fibonacci():
    assert fibonacci(0) == 0
    assert fibonacci(1) == 1
    assert fibonacci(5) == 5
    assert fibonacci(10) == 55
    print("All tests passed successfully!")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    test_fibonacci()
```
